response.overview: The story of a teacher who becomes the center of attention at school because of his overly nerdy style often touches the hearts of students. Despair is not an option for Ben, as he strives to prove that other teachers' perceptions of the students in his class are wrong. It turns out that Ben's efforts have greatly changed the performance of students who were previously left behind and looked down upon.
response.title: Cikgu Nerd
